title: Vortex Web runtime migration
summary: This release moves Vortex Web onto the new runtime foundation with WebGPU rendering work, improved shadows, cleaner architecture, and a large step away from the old 2+2 override files.
changelog: Moved the game client toward a single bundled Vortex Web runtime instead of order-dependent override scripts.
Added the new WebGPU renderer path with older renderer code being phased out.
Reworked shadows with quality presets and better runtime control.
Ported major engine, world, input, audio, HUD, avatar, and multiplayer systems into typed web-client services.
Improved profile cosmetics, badges, name effects, nameplates, and leaderboard styling.
Removed legacy 2+2-only gameplay pieces from the core direction and prepared the runtime for future streamed assets, equipment, physics, and scripting APIs.
Packets updated to support new multiplayer relay features and future gameplay systems.
